response.justification: Bogdan is a strong match: nearly two decades of full-stack work, with recent roles squarely in the TypeScript/Node.js/React stack, plus current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience — a required skill that is rare to find. He brings deep testing culture (TDD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses), cloud and container experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), and both relational and NoSQL databases. Gaps are modest: no explicit Nest.js or Vitest exposure, no Kotlin, and an unexplained employment gap in 2020, none of which outweigh the overall fit for a senior IC role.
strengths: 19+ years of full-stack experience, recent roles in TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS
Current AI-agent and MCP code-generation work directly matches the required AI agent development skill
Exceptional testing pedigree: TDD practitioner, author of test frameworks, and testing course instructor
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed, though adjacent expertise makes ramp-up likely fast
Kotlin absent and Java experience is dated; Python not listed among languages
Unexplained ~8-month employment gap between January 2020 and September 2020

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
